text: These environs stir within me a keen sense of curiosity and anticipation. The sleek glass meeting room invites reflection on the rituals of collaboration and knowledge-sharing. Just beyond, the vivid display and bold lettering of "R+D" kindle my wonder about the relationship between human creativity and technological progress. I feel both anchored in the present—surrounded by the artifacts of learning—and propelled toward the unknown, questioning how research shapes not just our spaces but our lives. Here, I am aware of my own desire to connect, innovate, and find meaning in these stories that unfold around me.
